Our Story

Building Denver's Homes Since 2009

What started as a two-person crew with a shared passion for quality craftsmanship has grown into one of the Denver metro's most trusted general contracting firms.

From Foundation to Finish

Summit Pro Builders was founded by Marcus Cole and Ryan Nguyen, two journeyman carpenters who believed Denver homeowners deserved better than the typical contractor experience: missed deadlines, surprise costs, and shoddy workmanship.

They started by taking on kitchen remodels in their own neighborhood, earning trust one project at a time. Word spread quickly. Fifteen years later, we've completed over 500 residential projects across the Front Range, from custom home additions in Cherry Creek to whole-home renovations in Boulder.

Our promise remains the same as day one: honest estimates, quality craftsmanship, and a finished product you'll be proud to call home.

15+
Years in Business
500+
Projects Completed
4.9
Avg. Rating
What We Stand For

Our Core Values

These principles guide every project we take on and every relationship we build.

Safety First

OSHA-compliant job sites, proper permitting, and thorough inspections at every stage. We never cut corners when it comes to the safety of our team and your family.

On-Time Delivery

We set realistic timelines and stick to them. Our project managers coordinate every trade so your renovation stays on schedule, because we know life doesn't stop for a remodel.

Quality Without Compromise

Premium materials, skilled tradespeople, and rigorous quality checks. We build every home as if it were our own, backed by a comprehensive warranty on all workmanship.

The People Behind the Projects

Meet Our Leadership

Experienced professionals dedicated to delivering exceptional results on every project.

MC

Marcus Cole

Co-Founder & Lead Estimator

20 years in residential construction. Licensed general contractor with a keen eye for detail and a reputation for accurate, honest estimates. Builds trust before he builds walls.

RN

Ryan Nguyen

Co-Founder & Project Director

Oversees every active project from permits to punch list. Journeyman carpenter turned operations leader. Known for keeping jobs on time and crews motivated.

TP

Teresa Padilla

Design Consultant

Interior design degree from CU Denver and 10 years of residential remodel experience. Helps homeowners turn Pinterest boards into buildable plans that fit their budget.

Let's Build Something Great Together

Schedule a free consultation and let us show you why hundreds of Denver homeowners trust Summit Pro Builders with their most important investment.
